character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Directed the group to a treasure site, took compass bearings, and attempted to reassure his crew after encountering a ghostly voice.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Expressed fear of Flint, groveled on the ground, and reacted strongly to the ghostly voice.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: Commented on Flint's voice, expressed relief after Silver's argument, and urged the crew to move.

character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: Prayed with his Bible, indicating a religious upbringing before falling into piracy.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Identified as the source of the ghostly voice, with Silver and Morgan confirming his identity.

character_dossiers.name: Flint
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased pirate whose ghostly voice was feared by the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Darby M'Graw
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased pirate whose ghostly voice sang a song, causing fear among the crew.
